events.title: Kirtan with Diana at Dragon Tea Temple
events.description: Diana Beauty leads an intimate Thursday kirtan evening at Dragon Tea Temple — call-and-response devotional song woven from bhajans, mantras, and sacred chant, led on harmonium and guitar with mridanga and karatals. The Mantraman series at Dragon Tea Temple has become one of Penestanan's most trusted sacred-music formats; the July 16 edition passes to Diana. Doors 6:30 PM, ceremony begins 7:00 PM. Barefoot, candlelit, alcohol-free — DTT's garden format.
events.short_description: Diana Beauty leads kirtan in Dragon Tea Temple's candlelit garden — harmonium, call-and-response devotional song.
events.venue_address: Jl. Penestanan No.8, Sayan, Ubud, Bali
